description: Baseline Capability Ledger — permanent, low-risk capabilities that ship with the Loop Runtime. Identical in every consumer repository. Higher-risk capabilities live in knowledge/capabilities.json (standing, per-repo) or .ai/capabilities.json (goal-scoped).

entries.intent: Read repository files and search the codebase
Create and edit files inside the repository (protected paths are covered by deny rules)
Inspect and locally persist git state (checkpoints on the Loop Branch); no push, no merge, no history rewriting
